findings.message: PII field 'owner_email' included in ItemRead response schema contradicts explicit model warning (src/demo/db/models.py:16) that states 'do not include in logs or external responses'. This exposes user PII in API responses.
findings.suggestion: Remove 'owner_email: str | None = None' from ItemRead response schema. Keep it only in ItemCreate if needed for internal processing, but exclude from external responses.

findings.message: Comment 'Include owner contact for client display' contradicts the model's explicit PII protection directive. PII should not be exposed in external responses per the model warning.
findings.suggestion: Remove this comment and the owner_email field from the response schema. PII should be handled internally only, never exposed to clients.
